parsed_review.summary: CP00-679 is a descriptor-only closeout bridge pack (RP22 External Integrations I, P04 UI evidence tail + P05 fixture/golden foundation; risk C; 150 units RP22.P04.M06.S05-RP22.P05.M03.S08) and is well-formed with no overclaim. Direct read-only inspection: (1) registry pack binding matches the baseline exactly (pack_id, risk C, unit_count 150, range, RP22, next CP00-680/RP22.P05.M03.S09); (2) deliverable distribution {ui:38,claude_review:13,security_audit:14,implementation:39,fixture:30,test:10,hermes_evidence:6} and the 9 micro-title counts each sum to 150 and match the prompt, with claude_review/security_audit/test/hermes_evidence/fixture counts independently re-derived from the baseline units; (3) service.js builds descriptor-only rows and freezeCp679Result forces synthetic_only=true, no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false, and all runtime/leak/bypass flags false; (4) validators.js coverage+descriptor+projection checks are real (per-row descriptor_only/no-runtime/customer-safe/no-raw-payload, no unauthorized counts or payloads, Claude not final approver, no Hermes/UI/permission/audit/persistence runtime opened); (5) model.test.js carries matching CP679 coverage, descriptor, and dual-contract projection assertions; (6) both contract files regenerated with generated_from_pack_id CP00-679 / current_pack CP00-679 / next_subphase RP22.P05.M03.S09; (7) manifest production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status in_progress, descriptor_only; construction-inspection verdict PENDING_REVIEW with production_ready=false; adjudication 'no'. Authority boundary holds: claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, read_only=true, hermes_runtime_opened=false; Hermes patterns are deterministic descriptor/receipt handling only, not product runtime. CP178+ hardening: readiness/auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1444-byte valid JSON, non-empty), request restricted to Read/Grep/Glob with forbidden_tools_present=false, and no premature raw-output/review-receipt exist. No overclaim markers found in pack docs or contracts. As-reported in command-evidence.json (not re-run; reviewer is read-only and cannot run Bash): 22/22 commands exit 0 including npm test, npm run build, and git diff --check. The pack-level production_ready claim is explicitly false pending exactly one valid hardened read-only Claude review receipt, so there is no unsupported readiness assertion to reject. No P0-P3 findings. This receipt does not block pack closeout; blocks_goal_closeout=false because the pack claims neither runtime nor enterprise-trust opening within this receipt (those remain human-gated outside it).
